name: AITestAutomate
description: AITestAutomate is an open-source AI testing platform for QA teams.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @AITestAutomate/api & npm run dev --workspace @AITestAutomate/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @AITestAutomate/api && npm run build --workspace @AITestAutomate/web
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @AITestAutomate/api && npm run check --workspace @AITestAutomate/web
